description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the opensuse:latest Docker image, define a variable MAIN_CATALOG set to /etc/xml/catalog, and configure a cache keyed 'zypper' that stores /var/cache/zypper/** and /var/cache/zypp/**. Define a single stage called build. Add a job named "Build Output" in the build stage that runs a before_script of ./.gitlab/opensuse-install.sh and copies .gitlab/jing.conf to /etc/java/, then executes the script ./.gitlab/build.sh. Configure the job to publish artifacts named DocBook-Tutorial, including build/docbook-tutorial.pdf and build/docbook-tutorial.html, when the job succeeds.
